title: LiteVanish
description: Perfect choice for tahse seeking a low perfomance vanish plugin
body:
![image_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/696d2d8882891429bd3a5737c3ba7bccb06d0c68.png)
[![support: https://discord.com/invite/nQAukFUkMq](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49b7823012d8f91103d2f8fafca630a59efca175.png)](https://discord.com/invite/nQAukFUkMq)[![wiki: https://wiki-or-t2h-team.gitbook.io/wiki-t2hstudio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d868ebdeaf36a564f17b24ff7394328b5ce1cf78.png)](https://wiki-or-t2h-team.gitbook.io/wiki-t2hstudio/litevanish/about)
![**Features:**- Vansih mode toggle - Hide other players - Self-hiding to avoid confusion - prevent item pick up while in vanish - cancel join/leave messages - maintain vanish state - vanish status placeholder - and more... ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22b1a7ccdcb4dabc85973f633654386aac767975.png)


<details>
<summary>Information text</summary>

**Features:**
- Vansih mode toggle
- Hide other players 
- Self-hiding to avoid confusion 
- prevent item pick up while in vanish
- cancel join/leave messages 
- maintain vanish state 
- vanish status placeholder 
- and more...

</details>



Need help? Don't hesitate to enter the **[discord](https://discord.com/invite/nQAukFUkMq)**

Information on permissions, commands, placeholders, etc in our **[wiki](https://wiki-or-t2h-team.gitbook.io/wiki-t2hstudio/litevanish/about)**
